summary: Fix 4 failing tests in auth-service enrollment_token_test.go by ensuring database migrations run properly to create the enrollment_tokens table before tests execute

user_stories.i_want: test database migrations to run automatically before test execution
user_stories.so_that: all required tables exist when tests run and I get reliable test results
acceptance_criteria: enrollment_tokens table is created before enrollment_token_test.go tests run
all migration files in migrations/ directory are executed during test setup
tests can be run with simple 'go test' command without manual database setup
test database is properly cleaned up after test completion

user_stories.i_want: testutil to support running all available migrations
user_stories.so_that: new migration files are automatically included in test runs
acceptance_criteria: testutil/migrate.go discovers and runs all .up.sql migration files
migrations run in correct order based on filename sequence
migration failures are reported with clear error messages

functional_requirements.title: Fix testutil migration execution
functional_requirements.description: internal/testutil/migrate.go must execute all migration files from the migrations directory, not just a hardcoded subset. The current implementation may only create the users table, missing the enrollment_tokens table created in 000006_create_enrollment_tokens_table.up.sql

functional_requirements.title: Discover migration files dynamically
functional_requirements.description: testutil should scan the migrations directory for all .up.sql files and execute them in filename order to ensure complete database schema setup

functional_requirements.title: Verify migration execution order
functional_requirements.description: Ensure migrations execute sequentially in filename order (000001 through 000006) to respect foreign key dependencies and table creation order

functional_requirements.title: Secure Print Release
functional_requirements.description: Implement PIN, badge, or mobile app authentication at printer before document release to prevent sensitive documents from being left unattended
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Essential for enterprise and healthcare markets - table stake for security-conscious customers

functional_requirements.title: Print Quota & Cost Allocation
functional_requirements.description: User and departmental quotas with cost tracking, chargeback to cost centers, and budget enforcement
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Key differentiator for education and enterprise segments - enables cost recovery and accountability

functional_requirements.title: Comprehensive Audit Logging
functional_requirements.description: Detailed logging of all print activities including user, document, printer, timestamp, page count, and outcome for compliance and forensics
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Foundational for SOC2/ISO27001 compliance and enterprise sales

functional_requirements.title: Sustainability Dashboard
functional_requirements.description: Track and report environmental impact including paper saved, trees preserved, CO2 reduction, and waste reduction metrics
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Appeals to ESG-focused organizations and helps with green certifications

functional_requirements.title: Follow-Me Printing
functional_requirements.description: Users print to a virtual queue and release jobs at any available printer via authentication, improving flexibility and reducing waste
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Must-have for modern mobile workforce and hot-desking environments

functional_requirements.title: Mobile Print Applications
functional_requirements.description: Native iOS and Android apps for printing from mobile devices with camera scan and document upload capabilities
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: PaperCut's Mobility Print has 100M+ downloads - huge market opportunity

functional_requirements.title: SOC2/ISO27001 Compliance Framework
functional_requirements.description: Implement security controls, audit trails, access management, and documentation required for enterprise compliance certifications
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Required for enterprise and government sales - significant revenue impact

functional_requirements.title: Advanced Reporting & Analytics
functional_requirements.description: Customizable reports on usage, costs, environmental impact, user behavior, and trends with export capabilities and scheduled delivery
functional_requirements.competitive_advantage: Enables data-driven decision making and is a key evaluation criteria for buyers

non_functional_requirements.requirement: Tests must pass consistently on fresh database instances
non_functional_requirements.metric: 100% pass rate on clean test database

non_functional_requirements.requirement: New migration files should be automatically picked up without code changes
non_functional_requirements.metric: zero code changes required for new migrations

non_functional_requirements.requirement: Test database setup should complete quickly

risks.risk: Breaking existing tests by changing migration behavior
risks.mitigation: Run full test suite after changes to verify no regressions

risks.risk: Migration execution order dependencies causing failures
risks.mitigation: Ensure filename-based ordering is preserved and test with all migrations

risks.risk: Test database cleanup issues between test runs
risks.mitigation: Implement proper teardown and transaction rollback in test fixtures

implementation_phases.name: Diagnosis
tasks: Read internal/testutil/migrate.go to understand current migration logic
Read enrollment_token_test.go to understand test requirements
List all migration files to confirm complete set

implementation_phases.name: Fix Implementation
tasks: Modify internal/testutil/migrate.go to execute all migration files
Add dynamic migration file discovery if not present
Ensure migrations execute in filename order

implementation_phases.name: Verification
tasks: Run full auth-service test suite to ensure no regressions

implementation_phases.name: Documentation
tasks: Update CLAUDE.md with test database setup notes if needed
Comment the migration logic in testutil for future maintainers

key_gaps: Secure print release with authentication at device (PIN/badge/card) to prevent document theft and ensure confidentiality
Print quota management with departmental cost allocation and chargeback for accurate cost tracking and budget control
Comprehensive print job auditing and reporting for compliance, cost analysis, and usage optimization
Mobile printing application for iOS/Android to enable bring-your-own-device printing
Sustainability and environmental impact reporting (paper saved, trees saved, CO2 reduction)
unique_selling_points: Modern microservices architecture with horizontal scalability, unlike legacy competitors
Open-source core enabling transparency and community contributions
Cloud-native design supporting hybrid and multi-cloud deployments from day one
Extensive identity provider support (OIDC/SAML) for enterprise integration
Go-based implementation offering better performance and resource efficiency than Java-based competitors
Built-in observability with OpenTelemetry tracing for operations excellence
Agent-based architecture supporting heterogeneous device ecosystems without vendor lock-in
